hierarchy_rules.h1: font-display text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy_rules.h2: font-display text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy_rules.h3: font-display text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy_rules.h4: font-display text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold tracking-tight text-text-primary
hierarchy_rules.labels: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-text-secondary font-medium

typography.notes: Syne must be used with bold/black weights and tight tracking to avoid generic look. JetBrains Mono is strictly for numbers, SKUs, inventory counts, and AI probability percentages.

colors.notes: This is a strictly Dark Theme application. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The teal accent must be used specifically for positive metrics (stock increase, healthy levels) and not as a generic primary button color unless it's a primary conversion action. Indigo is reserved purely for AI predictions and automated insights.

sidebar.behavior: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen overflow-y-auto border-r border-[#30363D] bg-[#0D1117]
sidebar.nav_items: Hover states must have bg-[#161B22] and text-[#E6EDF3]. Active states use a subtle indigo left-border indicator.

main_content.grid_strategy: Control Room Protocol. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6.

bento_grid.kpi_card: col-span-1 p-6 border border-[#30363D] bg-[#161B22] rounded-lg
bento_grid.chart_panel: col-span-2 lg:col-span-3 p-6 border border-[#30363D] bg-[#161B22] rounded-lg
bento_grid.side_panel: col-span-1 row-span-2 p-6 border border-[#30363D] bg-[#161B22] rounded-lg

cards.style: Flat, sharp or max rounded-lg (8px). border border-[#30363D] bg-[#161B22].
cards.shadows: No diffuse shadows. Use crisp 1px borders to define hierarchy.
cards.hover: Slight border highlight (e.g., border-[#8B949E]/50) or subtle bg lightening. DO NOT use heavy translation (-translate-y-1) for data cards, only for interactive elements.

tables.style: Dense data grid. border-collapse w-full text-left
tables.header: bg-[#0D1117] border-b border-[#30363D] text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-[#8B949E]

buttons.primary: bg-[#E6EDF3] text-[#0D1117] hover:bg-white font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#161B22] border border-[#30363D] text-[#E6EDF3] hover:bg-[#30363D] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.ai_action: bg-[#818CF8]/10 border border-[#818CF8]/30 text-[#818CF8] hover:bg-[#818CF8]/20 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.destructive: bg-[#EF4444]/10 border border-[#EF4444]/30 text-[#EF4444] hover:bg-[#EF4444]/20 rounded-md px-4 py-2 inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2

badges.low_stock: bg-[#F59E0B]/10 text-[#F59E0B] border border-[#F59E0B]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full inline-flex
badges.out_of_stock: bg-[#EF4444]/10 text-[#EF4444] border border-[#EF4444]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full inline-flex
badges.healthy: bg-[#00D4AA]/10 text-[#00D4AA] border border-[#00D4AA]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full inline-flex
badges.ai_insight: bg-[#818CF8]/10 text-[#818CF8] border border-[#818CF8]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded flex items-center gap-1 w-fit

charts.tooltip: bg-[#161B22] border border-[#30363D] text-[#E6EDF3] rounded-lg shadow-xl p-3

forms.inputs: bg-[#0D1117] border border-[#30363D] text-[#E6EDF3] focus:border-[#818CF8] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#818CF8] rounded-md px-3 py-2 w-full

icons.notes: Keep icons crisp and technical. Do not use filled icons unless representing an active/toggled state.

motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use `transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out` for all interactive states (hover, focus, active).
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: Visible focus rings are MANDATORY for accessibility. Use `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#818CF8] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#0D1117]`.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use skeleton loaders with `animate-pulse bg-[#30363D]/50 rounded` instead of generic spinners for tables and charts.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark mode architectural structure, glowing subtle indigo and teal data lines, technical precision. Use as a split-screen or full background for the Login/Register page.

Macro close-up of a high-tech glowing amber/red warning indicator. Use as a subtle background image (with heavy opacity reduction, e.g., opacity-10) inside critical AI alert panels or prediction cards.
Professional male avatar for user profile or supplier contact.
Professional avatar for user profile or supplier contact.
Professional avatar for user profile or supplier contact.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text, especially text-secondary (#8B949E), passes WCAG AA contrast ratios against the background (#0D1117) and surface (#161B22) colors.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='inventory-row-123'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. DO NOT introduce random grays or whites for backgrounds.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away the default styling to match the flat, sharp, #161B22 surface / #30363D border aesthetic.
Implement the Layout's Bento Grid for the Dashboard: strictly use the column spans and 240px fixed sidebar.
Charts must use Recharts and inherit the custom colors provided in the acccents and states objects. Do NOT use default Recharts colors.
The app must not look like a generic Vercel template. Typography hierarchy is critical: use Syne font for headings, JetBrains Mono for metrics and table data, and Plus Jakarta Sans for body text.
Ensure all interactive items have the `data-testid` attribute assigned for testing.
